brief: US and Iran exchange strikes over Strait of Hormuz, while a Toronto street festival shooting kills two and floods in Missouri prompt helicopter rescues. Research papers explore AI in crime linkage, missing data visualization, and brain-computer interfaces in China.
news_summary: US launches strikes on Iran after a vessel was hit in the Strait of Hormuz; Toronto police search for a shooter after two killed at a street festival; Missouri floods rescue hundreds from a summer camp.
papers_summary: Papers include ImputeViz for missing data diagnosis, a study of AI in crime linkage analysis, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China.

en.brief: US and Iran exchange strikes over Strait of Hormuz, while a Toronto street festival shooting kills two and floods in Missouri prompt helicopter rescues. Research papers explore AI in crime linkage, missing data visualization, and brain-computer interfaces in China.
en.news_summary: US launches strikes on Iran after a vessel was hit in the Strait of Hormuz; Toronto police search for a shooter after two killed at a street festival; Missouri floods rescue hundreds from a summer camp.
en.papers_summary: Papers include ImputeViz for missing data diagnosis, a study of AI in crime linkage analysis, and a landscape analysis of brain-computer interface trials in China.

zh.brief: 中国一周内遭遇两个台风，近200万人疏散；韩国寺庙举办相亲活动助单身男女交友；德国破获华人跨国性侵案。研究方面涉及脑机接口在中国临床试验、传统绘画可视化等。
zh.news_summary: 双台风接连登陆中国，浙江等地大规模疏散；韩国僧人组织30小时山林静修相亲；德国宣判华人跨国性侵案。
zh.papers_summary: 学术论文研究脑机接口在中国的临床试验进展，以及基于知识图谱的传统中国画可视化分析系统。

todays_image.caption: The first helicopter mail sack symbolizes early innovation in overcoming geographic barriers, much like today's conflict over the Strait of Hormuz, a strategic chokepoint for global energy transit.
todays_image.title: First helicopter mail sack
